cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky: nejdřív nastavte pero, pak nakreslete [hlp]čáru 120 pixelů[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="26"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="200" y="120"><field name="COLOUR">#00aa00</field></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="22" y="210"><value name="WIDTH"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="50" y="50"><field name="COLOUR">#00aa00</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
